location.leadingComments:
Represents seconds of UTC time since Unix epoch
 1970-01-01T00:00:00Z. Must be from 0001-01-01T00:00:00Z to
 9999-12-31T23:59:59Z inclusive.

Non-negative fractions of a second at nanosecond resolution. Negative
 second values with fractions must still have non-negative nanos values
 that count forward in time. Must be from 0 to 999,999,999
 inclusive.
DeliveryService provides gRPC API for delivery operations
GetCourier retrieves a single courier by ID
GetCourierPool retrieves couriers with filtering and pagination
RegisterCourier registers a new courier in the system
leadingDetachedComments:
==================== Courier Lifecycle ====================
 Courier lifecycle: registration, activation, archival

location.leadingComments: ActivateCourier sets courier status to FREE (available for orders)
DeactivateCourier sets courier status to UNAVAILABLE
ArchiveCourier performs soft delete (sets status to ARCHIVED)
UpdateContactInfo updates courier phone and email
UpdateWorkSchedule updates courier work hours and zone
ChangeTransportType changes courier transport and recalculates max_load
AcceptOrder accepts an order from OMS for delivery
AssignOrder assigns a package to a courier
PickUpOrder confirms package pickup by courier
DeliverOrder confirms delivery or failed delivery attempt by courier
GetCourierDeliveries retrieves recent deliveries for a courier
GetOrderTracking returns live delivery tracking by OMS order ID
SubscribeOrderTracking streams tracking snapshots whenever delivery state changes

==================== Random Address ====================
 GetRandomAddress returns a random address within the configured region (e.g. Berlin bbox)
GetRandomAddressRequest is empty; bounds come from server config (env)
GetRandomAddressResponse returns one random address within configured bbox
RegisterCourierRequest contains data for new courier registration
GetCourierPoolRequest contains filters for courier pool query
Courier represents a courier in the pool response
Address represents a physical address for pickup/delivery
DeliveryPeriod represents the desired delivery time window
PackageInfo contains physical characteristics of the package
PackageStatus represents the delivery lifecycle state
RecipientContacts contains recipient contact details for delivery
AcceptOrderRequest contains data to accept an order for delivery
AcceptOrderResponse returns the created package data
GetCourierRequest contains courier ID to retrieve
ActivateCourierRequest contains courier ID to activate
DeactivateCourierRequest contains courier ID to deactivate
ArchiveCourierRequest contains courier ID to archive
ChangeTransportTypeResponse returns update result with recalculated max_load
GetCourierDeliveriesRequest contains courier ID and pagination

location.trailingComments: Max number of deliveries to return (default 5)

location.leadingComments: DeliveryRecord represents a completed or in-progress delivery
GetCourierDeliveriesResponse returns list of courier's deliveries
TrackingCourier represents courier details for customer tracking
GetOrderTrackingResponse returns live tracking information for a delivery order
PickUpOrderRequest contains data for confirming package pickup
NotDeliveredReason defines reasons for failed delivery
NotDeliveredDetails contains reason and optional description (required if reason == OTHER)
DeliverOrderRequest contains data for confirming delivery
Address represents a physical address with coordinates
DeliveryPeriod represents the desired delivery time window
NotDeliveredDetails contains reason and optional description (required if reason == OTHER)
AcceptOrderCommand - Command to accept an order from OMS
AssignOrderCommand - Command to assign a package to a courier
DeliverOrderCommand - Command for courier to confirm delivery
UpdateCourierLocationCommand - Command to update courier location
RegisterCourierCommand - Command to register a new courier

PackageAcceptedEvent - canonical name: delivery.package.accepted.v1
 Event when a package is accepted into the pool
OccurredAt is the timestamp when the event occurred

PackageAssignedEvent - canonical name: delivery.package.assigned.v1
 Event when a package is assigned to a courier
OccurredAt is the timestamp when the event occurred

PackageInTransitEvent - canonical name: delivery.package.in_transit.v1
 Event when package is picked up and in transit
Order ID (from OMS, for consumer lookup)
OccurredAt is the timestamp when the event occurred

PackageDeliveredEvent - canonical name: delivery.package.delivered.v1
 Event when package is successfully delivered
OccurredAt is the timestamp when the event occurred

PackageNotDeliveredEvent - canonical name: delivery.package.not_delivered.v1
 Event when package delivery failed
Not delivered details (reason; description required if reason == OTHER)
OccurredAt is the timestamp when the event occurred

CourierRegisteredEvent - canonical name: delivery.courier.registered.v1
 Event when a new courier is registered
OccurredAt is the timestamp when the event occurred

CourierLocationUpdatedEvent - canonical name: delivery.courier.location_updated.v1
 Event when courier location is updated
OccurredAt is the timestamp when the event occurred

CourierStatusChangedEvent - canonical name: delivery.courier.status_changed.v1
 Event when courier status changes
OccurredAt is the timestamp when the event occurred

PackageRequiresHandlingEvent - canonical name: delivery.package.requires_handling.v1
 Event when package requires manual handling
OccurredAt is the timestamp when the event occurred
GetPackagePoolQuery - Query to get package pool with filters
GetCourierPoolQuery - Query to get courier pool with filters
Package represents a package in the system
Courier represents a courier in the system
